recommended_steps: Unplug the washer from power source
Locate the drain pump filter (usually at front bottom of washer)
Place towels on floor and have a shallow container ready
Open the filter access panel and slowly unscrew the drain pump filter
Remove any debris, coins, lint, or foreign objects blocking the pump
Check the drain hose for kinks or blockages
Clean the filter thoroughly and reinstall it
Run a test drain cycle to verify the issue is resolved
If problem persists after cleaning, the drain pump motor may need replacement
